landing.headline: Farming That Heals the Earth
landing.subheadline: AI-powered organic farming for sustainable yields and healthy soil

problem.title: The Problem We Cannot Ignore
problem.subtitle: Chemical farming promised progress. It's delivered poison. Here's what we're losing:
problem.soilDesc: Chemical farming depletes soil in 20-30 years. Our soil is dying faster than we can regenerate it.
problem.chemicalsDesc: Annual pesticide use worldwide. Poisoning groundwater and harming farm workers every day.
problem.deathsDesc: Pesticide exposure causes 1+ million preventable deaths every year globally.
problem.nutritionDesc: Chemical crops have 60% fewer minerals than organic produce. Our food is empty.
problem.conclusion: We're losing the fight against soil degradation, toxins, and corporate greed.
problem.hope: But there's hope. Traditional farming methods work. AI amplifies them. And farmers are ready to change.

ancient.title: Ancient Wisdom for Modern Times
ancient.subtitle: Organic farming isn't new. It's timeless. Proven across cultures for millennia.

americas.title: The Three Sisters
americas.desc: Companion planting: corn, beans, and squash together. Maximizes yield while regenerating soil.

africa.title: Agroforestry
africa.desc: Integrating trees with crops. Prevents erosion, fixes carbon, and provides diverse harvest.

comparison.title: Traditional vs Chemical Farming
comparison.subtitle: Comprehensive impact comparison that tells the real story
comparison.conclusion: These methods work. We combine them with AI for maximum impact.

why_now.title: Why Now? The Perfect Moment
why_now.subtitle: Consumers demand organic. Farmers want to transition. Technology makes it possible. The planet can't wait any longer.

india.desc: Leading organic farming adoption. 6 million certified organic farms.

costarica.desc: Agriculture is 25% certified organic. Carbon neutral by 2050 goal.

kenya.desc: Agroforestry movement spreading. Drought-resistant crops thriving.

armenia.desc: First EU country pursuing 100% organic goal by 2050.

opportunities.demandDesc: Consumers are willing to pay premium prices for organic. Supply can't meet demand.
opportunities.policyDesc: Governments incentivizing organic farming. EU subsidies, India's promotion of natural farming.
opportunities.readinessDesc: Farmers know organic is better. They just need AI tools, consultants, and market access.
opportunities.moment: This is the moment. AgriSmart closes the gap.
opportunities.conclusion: We connect farmer readiness with consumer demand using AI power.

features.title: Technology That Amplifies Nature
features.subtitle: AI isn't meant to replace farming. It amplifies ancient wisdom. Three tools. Infinite possibilities.

crop.title: Crop Prediction Engine
crop.desc: AI analyzes soil data, weather patterns, and historical yields to recommend the perfect crops for your land.

disease.title: Disease Detection AI
disease.desc: Smartphone camera + ML model identifies plant diseases instantly. Stop problems before they spread.

monitor.title: Smart Farm Monitor
monitor.desc: IoT sensors track soil moisture, nutrient levels, and crop health 24/7 with AI-powered alerts.

howWorks.title: How It Works Together
howWorks.step1Desc: Smart sensors + AI analyze soil, weather, crops
howWorks.step2Desc: AI suggests crops, treatments, and timing
howWorks.step3Desc: 40% higher yields + healthy soil + premium prices

testimonials.title: Farmers Are Already Thriving
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from real farmers who switched to natural, AI-powered farming
testimonials.cta: Join thousands of farmers earning more while healing the planet

farmer1.name: Rajesh Patel
farmer1.quote: AgriSmart helped me transition from chemical to organic farming. My yield increased 45% and my soil is regenerating.

farmer2.name: Maria Santos
farmer2.quote: The disease detection AI saved my entire corn crop from blight. Two weeks of early warning made all the difference.

farmer3.name: James Kipchoge
farmer3.quote: Consulting with Dr. Omondi from AgriSmart changed everything. Now I grow drought-resistant crops profitably.

farmer4.name: Lin Chen
farmer4.quote: The crop prediction engine knows my farm better than I do. Premium organic prices are now realistic.

revenue.title: We're Transparent by Design
revenue.subtitle: Our Revenue Model Works For Farmers
revenue.info: We don't exploit farmers. We partner with them. Here's exactly how we make money—and why it aligns with your success.
revenue.benefitsDesc: Each revenue stream directly benefits farmers through features, tools, consultants, and market access.
revenue.growthDesc: As farmers earn more, we invest more in features.
revenue.sustainableDesc: Reinvesting profits into tech, consultants, and farmers.
revenue.aligned: Aligned Incentives - We win only when farmers win. Your success is our success.
revenue.noMonopoly: No Farm Monopoly - We're a partner, not a middleman. Farmers keep 75%+ of earnings.
revenue.continuous: Continuous Investment - Revenue funds better AI, more experts, and new features for you.
